repro.constraint: SYNTHETIC (PHASE 3 validated generator) + 2020 calibration ONLY; never touch 2026/other; SHORT/long-short = RESEARCH (deploy needs LO-exception sign-off)

verdict.headline: LONG-ONLY IS THE BINDING CONSTRAINT ON TRUE COMPLEMENTARITY: the ONLY candidate(s) that are RETURN-anticorrelated to trend in the bear AND lower combined DD across the full mix are ['SHORT_MA'] -- all SHORT/long-short (RESEARCH; deploy needs the LO-exception sign-off). No long-only candidate truly complements in the bear (cash/vol-gates only DAMPEN the bleed; long-only MR ADDS to it). The value of relaxing long-only is quantified in Q5. DEFENSIVE long-only gates (CASH_GATE / VOLTGT_DEF) are the best WITHIN-CONSTRAINT option.
lines: HEADLINE: LONG-ONLY IS THE BINDING CONSTRAINT ON TRUE COMPLEMENTARITY: the ONLY candidate(s) that are RETURN-anticorrelated to trend in the bear AND lower combined DD across the full mix are ['SHORT_MA'] -- all SHORT/long-short (RESEARCH; deploy needs the LO-exception sign-off). No long-only candidate truly complements in the bear (cash/vol-gates only DAMPEN the bleed; long-only MR ADDS to it). The value of relaxing long-only is quantified in Q5. DEFENSIVE long-only gates (CASH_GATE / VOLTGT_DEF) are the best WITHIN-CONSTRAINT option.
Q1: WHICH CANDIDATE IS RETURN-ANTICORRELATED TO TREND (the KEY test -- wins when trend loses)?
corr(candidate, trend) on RETURNS, per regime (negative = true complement):
SHORT_MA     : bull=-0.53  bear=-0.44  chop=-0.43  stitched=-0.36  [RESEARCH/short]
LONGSHORT_MA : bull=+0.69  bear=+0.07  chop=+0.93  stitched=+0.74  [RESEARCH/short]
CASH_GATE    : bull=+1.00  bear=+0.97  chop=+1.00  stitched=+1.00
VOLTGT_DEF   : bull=+0.95  bear=+0.90  chop=+0.98  stitched=+0.95
MR_LONG      : bull=+0.49  bear=+0.50  chop=+0.46  stitched=+0.31
Q2: THE BEAR GAP-FILL -- does the candidate post a POSITIVE return in the BEAR where trend bleeds?
trend-alone BEAR net = -6.9% (it BLEEDS -- this is the gap to fill)
SHORT_MA     : bear net +13.2% (positive in 85% of seeds) -> GENUINE FILL (positive in bear)  [RESEARCH/short]
LONGSHORT_MA : bear net +2.7% (positive in 70% of seeds) -> GENUINE FILL (positive in bear)  [RESEARCH/short]
CASH_GATE    : bear net -7.2% (positive in 0% of seeds) -> does NOT fill (loses/flat in bear)
VOLTGT_DEF   : bear net -4.4% (positive in 5% of seeds) -> does NOT fill (loses/flat in bear)
MR_LONG      : bear net -22.5% (positive in 15% of seeds) -> does NOT fill (loses/flat in bear)
Q3: THE COMBINED trend+candidate BOOK across the FULL regime mix (does it LOWER DD vs trend-alone?):
(combined maxDD MINUS trend-alone maxDD; POSITIVE = combined dampens DD; per regime)
SHORT_MA     : bull=+2.6  bear=+3.9  chop=+1.9  stitched=+4.3  (pp)  [RESEARCH/short]
LONGSHORT_MA : bull=+1.6  bear=+3.2  chop=+1.1  stitched=+2.8  (pp)  [RESEARCH/short]
CASH_GATE    : bull=+0.0  bear=-0.1  chop=+0.0  stitched=-0.1  (pp)
VOLTGT_DEF   : bull=+1.0  bear=+1.5  chop=+0.4  stitched=+2.4  (pp)
MR_LONG      : bull=-0.3  bear=-11.3  chop=+1.3  stitched=-5.6  (pp)
Q4 (DECISIVE): which sleeve TRULY complements across regimes?
SHORT_MA     : bear-corr -0.44, mix-DD-dampening +3.19pp, bear-net 13.15% -> TRUE COMPLEMENT  [RESEARCH/short -- needs LO-exception sign-off to deploy]
LONGSHORT_MA : bear-corr 0.07, mix-DD-dampening +2.17pp, bear-net 2.74% -> not a full-mix complement  [RESEARCH/short -- needs LO-exception sign-off to deploy]
VOLTGT_DEF   : bear-corr 0.9, mix-DD-dampening +1.35pp, bear-net -4.43% -> not a full-mix complement
CASH_GATE    : bear-corr 0.97, mix-DD-dampening -0.06pp, bear-net -7.25% -> not a full-mix complement
MR_LONG      : bear-corr 0.5, mix-DD-dampening -3.97pp, bear-net -22.48% -> not a full-mix complement
Q5 (QUANTIFIED): the VALUE of relaxing long-only -- trend+SHORT/long-short vs trend+MR(long-only),
across the FULL regime mix (mean over bull/bear/chop/stitched):
trend+SHORT_MA     vs trend+MR(LO): mix net -3.3pp, mix DD +7.2pp, BEAR net +18.1pp, BEAR DD +15.2pp  [SHORT = RESEARCH]
trend+LONGSHORT_MA vs trend+MR(LO): mix net +0.5pp, mix DD +6.1pp, BEAR net +13.2pp, BEAR DD +14.4pp  [SHORT = RESEARCH]

CAVEATS (binding): (1) SYNTHETIC test surface from PHASE 3's VALIDATED generator, calibrated to 2020 stylized facts ONLY -- a stress surface, not real future data. (2) SHORT_MA / LONGSHORT_MA VIOLATE the standing long-only+spot constraint -> RESEARCH only; deploying needs the user's explicit LO-exception sign-off. (3) maker cost, no MtM double-count, lag-1 causal. (4) >=20 seeds; distributions (mean +- spread + WORST seed) reported, no seed cherry-picked. (5) The synthetic bear is the 2020-COVID-crash exemplar -- a fast V-crash; a slow grind-down bear may differ. (6) Inverse-trend SHORT assumes the same maker fill economics as the long book; a real short has borrow/funding costs NOT modeled here -- the Q5 short advantage is an UPPER bound.
